title: lesquerella occidentalis var. diversifolia
intro: Lesquerella occidentalis var. diversifolia, also known as the western bladderpod, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving skin conditions. Lesquerella occidentalis var. diversifolia can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be made by infusing the plant's leaves or roots in a carrier oil or water.
